text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

100 
HAC_RDCTN_PMT_AMT 
LABEL: 
Hospital Acquired Conditions (HAC) Reduction Payment Amount 
DESCRIPTION: This field identifies the reduction in payment amount from the IPPS payment for hospitals that rank in 
the lowest-performing quartile of selected Hospital Acquired Conditions (HAC). 
SHORT NAME: HAC_RDCTN_PMT_AMT 
LONG NAME: HAC_RDCTN_PMT_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
0,
